name: Air-Conditioning and Warm Air Heating Equipment Manufacturing
rationale: Home market. Perfect constraint score (10.00) since the sensor was designed for this envelope, but the lowest new-ODI (4.93) because most needs are already satisfied by installed flow sensors (including Marquardt's own). Expansion potential is depth (new OEM accounts, higher DN range), not market discovery.
entryStrategy: 1) Defend and expand existing OEM accounts. 2) Upsell integrated-T variant for thermal-energy labelling. 3) Close SIKA VVX displacement gaps in tier-2 accounts. 4) Reuse existing channels. 5) Track as baseline reference.
